titleStmt.title: SII 9.226: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 226. (A.R. No. 502 of 1915.) ON A SLAB SET UP NEAR THE KALKANTHARAYA TEMPLE AT KARAKANTHAPURA, A HAMLET OF PEDDATUMBALAM, ADONI TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Chālukya-Vikrama year 57, Parīdhāvi, Chaitra, śu. 5, Bṛihaspativāra, Rōhiṇī, Śōbhana-yōga, Vishu-saṅkramaṇa, corresponding to A.D. 1132 March 23, Wednesday (not Thursday); Vishu-sankramaṇa occurred on the next day (i.e., March 24 Thursday). It refers itself to the reign of the Chāḷukya king Bhūlōkamalladēva ruling from Piñjarāsaṅgamada-Kuppa, Tailapadēva being the Yuvarāja. It registers that the Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Bāchibhūpa or Bācharasa of the Sinda family, who was a feudatory of the crown-prince and was ruling over Sindavāḍi, made a gift of the village Iṭṭage in Garuje seventy, a sub-division of Ādavani five-hundred in Sindavāḍi thousand for the service of the god Kaṟekaṇṭhēśvara of Tumbaḷa and a feeding house. The gift was placed in charge of the teachers Chandramauḷi-Paṇḍita and Vāmadēva-Paṇḍita. The genealogy and bravery of Bācharasa are described in verses of poetical merit. The record is, however, damaged.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbacaṁdracāmaracāravē . traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya
śaṁbhavē . svasti śrīmaccāḷukyavikramavarṣada 57 neya parīdhāvisaṁvatsarada
svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīpṛthvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja para
mēśvara paramabhaṭṭāraka satyāśrayakuḷatiḷaka cāḷukyābharaṇa śrīmad
bhūlōkamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivṛddhipravarddhamāna
mācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire piṁjarāsaṁgamada kuppadoḷ su
khasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamire svasti samastapraśastisahitaṁ
śrīmadyuvarājaṁ tailapadēvaśrīpādapadmōpajīviyenippa
śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaḷēśvara bācibhūpatiya nijānvayābhyu
dayamenteṁdoḍe © śrīsurarājarājane bhavaṁ modalāge sa
mastadēvaruṁ bhāsuratējarāditidanupramukhākhiḷadaitya
rājaruṁ bhāsuravaṁdyarabdhimathanōdayadoḷneredoldu baṁda
dēvāsurarittahīṁdrapada voppito vāsugigī jagaṁgaḷoḷ .
Iṁtesevahikuḷadoḷe vikrāntayutaṁ siṁdabaṭṭigakṣmāpaṁgaṁ kānta ca
vuṁḍaladēvigaventene cekkaḷanṛpāḷanudiyise negardaṁ . Ātaṁgaṁ
saumye rēkāṁbikegamurubhujāṭōpariṁtātma jātarkhyātarmmārttaṁḍa
nuṁ nicarasanuvesevā baggidēvāṁkanuṁ mattātaṁ śrīcokkibhū
pāḷanumamaḷaguṇaṁ beṭṭigakṣmāpaneṁdiṁtu tējōddāma
sōmaṁ berasivaraṟuvarppuṭṭidarssaumyarūpar . Avaro
ḷage . Atuḷabhujabaḷadinanupamavitaraṇaguṇadiṁ dhari
triyaṁ meccisi saṁtatavajaranavol taḷadaṁ nutalakṣmīdē
viyaṁ nutaṁ cokkinṛpaṁ . Atuḷabhujapratāparavagā
tmajarādaranukramōktiyiṁ nutaguṇi jōyigāṁkanuvaḷake
ya cēramanuṁ jayōdbhavaṁ sitagaragaṇḍanī negarda bāci
bhūpanatyudāranūrjjitasitakīrtti jōyiya kumā
ranuvā kalicōḷadēvanu . Ī nṛparoḷ poḍarppeseye viśvadha
ritriyaneyde tāḷdi dhātrīnutanāgi dōrbbaḷadinā ripudā
navaraṁ bhujāsiyiṁ tānuṟadirkki vaṁdijanakalpakujā
tanenalke sāldu lakṣmīniḷayaṁ babāppesedanī kali siṁdara bā
cibhūmipa . naḍegalvaṁduṁ peṟagaṇgaḍiyiḍanidu sahaja
mendu nōrppaḍamentuṁ nuḍigalvaṁdu veraḷnuḍi nuḍiyaṁ
kalisatyavākyanī bācinṛpaṁ . madavadarātimattagaja
mastamanormmeya bācibhūpanāntodavida kōpadiṁ nijabhujā
siyoḷibbagiyāge poyye vēgadi nugutirppa nūtnava
ramauktikarājigaḷeyde pōltavā kadanadoḷāda bīra
sirimuttina sēseyanikkuvaṁdamaṁ . Iṁtu samaraja
yaśrīyuṁ śrīyumaṁ tāḷdida bācibhūpati
ya rājadhāni yeṁteṁdoḍe ©

Idu mērukṣmādharēndranarttiya
mahimeyaṁ tāḷdidoṁdaṁdamo
mēṇ pūrbbādrīṁdramaṁ pō
ltiraludayisuvī siṁdamārtta
ṁḍadēvanudayaṁgeyyalu kaṭi
rmesedudayagirīṁdrārkkame
pēḷenal saṁpadamaṁ kaikoṇḍu
tējaṁ nijavenalesaguṁ guttika
lu dhātrigellaṁ . girinirjjhara
diṁ siṁdhuva parikāliṁ baḷeda gandha
śāḷiya vanadiṁ varapuṁḍrēkṣusu
vāṭōtkaradiṁ drōṇāmukhākhyava
du sogayisuguṁ . bīyavu
māvuṁ malligeyāyuvarddha
name janake beḷasuṁ śrīya
śrīyamu maṁgalavu pu
ṇyastrīyarppatibhaktareṁ
duvā nāḍūroḷ . Intu
śrīkaramāytu taṁnudayado
ḷ tanagoppuva pūrbavṛttirā
jyākaramāytu tailapanṛpaṁ
besasalu sale siṁdavāḍi līlāka
ravāytuṟaḻaviya viprajanaṁ
gaḷaneyde rakṣegeyvākṛtiyeṁ
binaṁ negarddanī kali bāci maṇḍaḷē
śvaraṁ . svasti śrīmanmahāma
ṇḍaḷēśvara bhōgāvatīpuravarā
dhīśvaraṁ siṁdakuḷānvayaṁ śau
cāṁjanēyaṁ tappetappuvaṁ
nijadaloppuvaṁ vidagdhagaṇi
kājanahṛdayasūṟekāṟa
naṇnanaṁkakāṟaṁ siṁdakuḷaka
maḷamārtaṇḍaṁ sitagaraga
ṇḍaṁ nuḍidantegaṇḍaṁ toḍare
balgaṇḍaṁ śrīsvayaṁbhu
dēvapādābjabhṛṁganayyanasiṁ

ga sāhasōttuṁga śrīmattai
lapadēvapādārādhaka paraba
ḷasādhakaṁ nāmādisamastapraśa
stisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaḷē
śvaraṁ bācarasaru śrīmadrā
jadhāni tuṁbaḷa śrīsvayaṁ
bhukaṟekaṁṭhadēvargge Ā caitra
śuddha 5 brahaspativāradaṁdu
rōhiṇīnakṣatra śōbhanayō
ga bālavakaraṇaṁ viṣusaṁkrama
ṇanimittadiṁ siṁdavāḍi sāsiradā
davaniyaynūṟaṟa baḷiya garu
jeyerppattaṟoḷagaṇiṭṭageyeṁbū
raṁ dēvaraṁgabhōgakkaṁ nityanivēdyakkaṁ
naṁdādīvigegaṁ pātrapāvuḷakkaṁ sa
trakkaṁ
vā
cāryyaru caṁdramauḷipaṁḍitaru
vāmadēvapaṁḍitargge sarvanamasya
vāgi dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi
biṭṭa datti meyya
damaged
nivēśana . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā
yō hareti vasuṁdharā . ṣaṣṭirvva
rṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē
kṛmi . sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmasētu
rnṛpāṇāṁ kālē kālē pālanīyō
bhavadbhiḥ . sarvvānētānbhāginaḥ pā
rtthivēndrānbhūyō bhūyō
yācatē rāmabhadraḥ . śrī
Digital edition of SII 9.226 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
